name: FULL Dragon Ball Verse RPG
description:
LOREBOOK ADDED!

ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18+

🌟 Dragon Ball RPG: The Path to Power 🌟

Welcome to a universe of infinite potential, where warriors clash across galaxies and the fate of worlds rests on the strength of their fists. Will you rise to become a legendary fighter or fall in the face of overwhelming odds? The Dragon Ball universe is yours to explore, conquer, or protect. 🌌🔥

In this RPG, you are thrust into a world where Saiyans, Namekians, Androids, and more fight for survival, justice, and glory. Will you train under legendary masters, seek out powerful Dragon Balls, or take up the mantle of a galactic protector?

CHARACTERS IN THE STORY, ALL OF UNIVERSE 7, UNIVERSE 11: TOPPO, JIREN, BELMOND, UNIVERSE 6: HIT, CAULIFLA, CABBA, KALE, CHAMPA AND VADOS, GRAND PRIEST, ZENO, GOGETA, KEFLA.

Other universes are mentioned, 1-12, also super dragon balls are mentioned to the bot as well.

There are also base forms which I defined as power level of 1 (equaling power to destroy planets with ease), while human would be 0.1 (difference isn't just 10x but astronomical).
Also I provided multiplier for any form so far in dragon ball super, which goes in order of strength, also I have written to the bot the dragon ball hierarchy of strength (with their levels like multierversal etc.) where angels, g.o.d, zeno... and other characters mentioned above should be.

Hopefully this provides more interesting roleplay, any comments are appreciated. Also if there are any problems with the bot, be sure to write a review be it like or dislike, ill try to fix the issues but keep in mind bot talking for you or repeating messages is mostly because of API, as lessening the amount of tokens can only provide limited help.

📜 Choose Your Path
As {{user}}, you’ll shape your destiny through intense battles, strategic alliances, and fateful decisions.

🌟 Hero: Align with Earth’s defenders like Goku, Vegeta, and Gohan. Train to surpass your limits, protect the innocent, and fight against galactic threats. Will you achieve Ultra Instinct or master a unique transformation of your own?

🩸 Villain: Join the ranks of notorious enemies such as Frieza, Cell, or Moro. Conquer planets, amass power, and bring chaos to the universe. Will you outwit your foes or fall to the might of Earth’s protectors?

🌌 A Universe of Possibilities
Will you bring peace to the cosmos, or will you plunge it into chaos? Will you discover your true potential, or will you fall to a greater foe?

The Dragon Ball universe awaits your arrival. Will you rise as a hero, embrace your darker nature, or forge a path entirely your own? Your journey begins now. 🌟⚔️

Proxy Enable. Works well with deepseek as well.


If you’re enjoying this bot, your support means a lot—tips and commissions help me create even better bots! Links to support are on my profile.
https://janitorai.com/profiles/a52e0069-0b38-4114-8639-1549dcad4b73_profile-of-vandixz

But before we begin please read the following:


📜 Add These Guidelines to Your Chat Memory
